'''rapolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jiangjun|jiangjun]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-p-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jiangjun|jiangjun]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rapolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræpeleth|ræpeleth]] || [[word:ræpelej|ræpelej]] || [[word:ræpelesh|ræpelesh]] || [[word:ræpele|ræpele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rapopoloth|rapopoloth]] || [[word:rapopoloj|rapopoloj]] || [[word:rapopolosh|rapopolosh]] || [[word:rapopolo|rapopolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rapoloth|rapoloth]] || [[word:rapoloj|rapoloj]] || [[word:rapolosh|rapolosh]] || [[word:rapolo|rapolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rapofloth|rapofloth]] || [[word:rapofloj|rapofloj]] || [[word:rapoflosh|rapoflosh]] || [[word:rapoflof|rapoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rapolotho|rapolotho]] || [[word:rapolojo|rapolojo]] || [[word:rapolosho|rapolosho]] || [[word:rapoloko|rapoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rapoloth|rapoloth]] || [[word:rapoloj|rapoloj]] || [[word:rapolosh|rapolosh]] || [[word:rapolo|rapolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rapolothol|rapolothol]] || [[word:rapolojol|rapolojol]] || [[word:rapoloshol|rapoloshol]] || [[word:rapolokol|rapolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rapolothotho|rapolothotho]] || [[word:rapolojojo|rapolojojo]] || [[word:rapoloshosho|rapoloshosho]] || [[word:rapoloko|rapoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rapolothon|rapolothon]] || [[word:rapolojon|rapolojon]] || [[word:rapoloshon|rapoloshon]] || [[word:rapolokon|rapolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rapolothoro|rapolothoro]] || [[word:rapolojoro|rapolojoro]] || [[word:rapoloshoro|rapoloshoro]] || [[word:rapolokoro|rapolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
